title: Shopkeeper: Paisa hatma chha
content: Term: Paisa hatma chha → Cash in hand → Cash Account (Asset)

title: Shopkeeper: Udharo diyeko
content: Term: Udharo diyeko → Credit sale → Accounts Receivable + Sales

title: Shopkeeper: Udharo liyeko
content: Term: Udharo liyeko → Credit purchase → Purchase + Accounts Payable

title: Shopkeeper: Ghar kharcha liyeko
content: Term: Ghar kharcha liyeko → Owner drawings → Drawings Account (NOT expense)

title: Shopkeeper: Bank ma jamma
content: Term: Bank ma jamma → Cash deposited to bank → Contra Dr Bank Cr Cash (NOT income)

title: Shopkeeper: Paisa aayo
content: Term: Paisa aayo → Money received (VAGUE) → NEED CLARIFICATION: sales/collection/loan/capital

title: Shopkeeper: Loan aayo bank bata
content: Term: Loan aayo → Dr Bank Cr Loan Payable (NOT income)

title: Shopkeeper: Maal aayo
content: Term: Maal aayo → Purchase/inventory receipt → Dr Purchase Cr Cash/Creditor

title: Shopkeeper: Maal gayo
content: Term: Maal gayo → Sales → Dr Cash/Debtor Cr Sales

title: Shopkeeper: TDS kaateko
content: Term: TDS kaateko → TDS Payable liability (verify rate with IRD/CA)
